apiToken.description: Cloudflare API Token (recommended). Sent as Authorization: Bearer <apiToken>. Scope it to the minimum permissions: Zone.Firewall Services + Zone.Zone Settings.

authEmail.description: Account email for legacy Global API Key auth (used only when apiToken is absent). Sent as X-Auth-Email.

authKey.description: Legacy Global API Key (used only when apiToken is absent). Sent as X-Auth-Key. Prefer a scoped apiToken instead.
